title: MPS-Native Analytic State-Averaged DMRG-CASSCF Gradients and Nonadiabatic Couplings beyond the Dense-FCI Limit: code and benchmark data
description: PySCF/pyblock2 implementation of analytic state-averaged DMRG-CASSCF nuclear gradients and nonadiabatic couplings with MPS-native response, together with the benchmark records supporting the accompanying methods manuscript: exact FCI controls, beyond-FCI finite-difference ledgers through CAS(24,24), LiF avoided-crossing tracking records, and the archived 178 fs ethylene SHARC trajectory.

creators.name: Li, Yuli
creators.affiliation: Department of Chemistry and Chemical Biology, Harvard University
